source_limitations: The workflow does not encode adult female eligibility, incontinence classification, infection status, voiding dysfunction, recurrence, or referral qualifiers.

Urinary-retention negatives, symptom progression, glucose or HbA1c, blood pressure, previous records, generic plan, safety-netting, fixed intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, medicine or procedure selection, referral urgency, and exact follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
